summary: Replaced the veterinarians mapping in buildEmergencyCard (lines 141-147) with an IIFE that uses vets.find(v => v.is_primary) to locate the primary vet. Returns a single-element array when a primary vet exists, or an empty array when none is set. The IIFE structure mirrors the emergency_contacts pattern at lines 154-163. No other lines were changed. getPetVets(pet.id) call at line 63 is untouched.
notes_for_reviewer: The IIFE pattern is structurally identical to the emergency_contacts block directly below it.
No fallback to first vet -- spec requires empty array when no primary is set, implemented exactly.
Comment text matches spec verbatim: '// Veterinarian info -- only show primary vet on emergency card'.
